rationale: The unresolved Iran deal keeps energy cost uncertainty alive for Romania; Ukraine striking Russian energy terminals is a nearby development but no new escalation toward the Black Sea region.

top_events.title: Trump says US-Iran deal to be signed Sunday; Tehran disputes timing
top_events.summary: Resolution of the Iran deal would ease global energy prices relevant to Romania's import-dependent economy. Continued dispute means no relief yet.

top_events.title: Ukraine strikes Russian sea energy terminal
top_events.summary: Ukraine hitting Russian energy infrastructure near the Black Sea is geographically close to Romania but represents continuation of war activity without direct spillover.

top_events.title: New EU migration rules debated
top_events.summary: EU migration policy reform could affect Romania's eastern border management and flows from Ukraine/Moldova, but no concrete rules adopted yet.
